name: Chocolate Truffle Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and pat into bottom and sides of 25 cm springform pan. Set aside.
1. Beat cheese until light and fluffy. Add sugar and beat again. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Stir in cream, cornstarch, and liqueur.
2. Pour into pan and bake at 190°F (88°C) for 45 minutes. Place pan of water on bottom rack while baking and preheating. Cake is done when edges are lightly brown and firm, and cake is still soft in middle. Loosen edges from pan and let cool about 2 hours.
3. Spread raspberry preserves on top of cake. Make ganache by combining sugar, butter, and heavy cream in a heavy-bottomed saucepan. Heat over low heat for 3 minutes until sugar is dissolved. Chop chocolate into small pieces and place in medium-sized bowl. Add hot cream mixture and whip well with wire whisk until chocolate melts and mixture is smooth. Add Chambord and mix.
4. Place bowl in larger bowl filled with ice water. Stir with spatula until thick enough to pipe through a pastry bag. Do not let chocolate harden, and do not let any of the ice water come near the chocolate!
